external_dependencies.blocker: SOC 2 Type I auditor not engaged; gap analysis document missing; engagement plan and readiness checklist exist but no auditor selected
Pen-test RFP finalized but not sent; vendor shortlist complete (SensePost recommended); no signed SOW or report received

controls.name: SOC 2 Type I
controls.evidence: SOC 2 readiness checklist (~92% mapped) and engagement plan (final) exist, but no gap analysis document and no auditor engaged.
controls.raw_output: cat docs/compliance/soc2-gap-analysis.md: No SOC 2 gap analysis found; grep -ri 'soc.*2|iso.*27001' docs/audit/: mentions in master-audit-report-2026-05-25.md indicate ~92% readiness, auditor not engaged; docs/audit/soc2-engagement-2026.md exists (final); docs/compliance/soc2-readiness-checklist.md exists (draft)

controls.name: Annual penetration test
controls.evidence: Pen-test scope doc (draft), vendor shortlist (current), and RFP (final) exist. Vendor shortlist complete (SensePost recommended). RFP target send date 2026-05-29 missed; no signed SOW or historical reports.
controls.raw_output: cat docs/audit/pen-test-scope-2026.md: Vendor shortlist complete — awaiting leadership selection & RFP send; cat docs/audit/pen-test-vendor-shortlist.md: SensePost recommended, Nclose fallback, budget $25k-$45k; docs/audit/pen-test-rfp-2026.md: final, target send 2026-05-29; find docs/audit/ -name '*pen*test*report*': no reports; docs/audit/pen-test-intake-evidence-2026-05-31.md: human SOW signature still pending

controls.name: Data residency guarantee
controls.evidence: Production Terraform defaults to af-south-1 with AZs af-south-1a/b/c. Data residency proof document exists. No DPA/residency addendum template found in-repo.
controls.raw_output: grep -r 'af-south-1' infra/terraform/environments/production/main.tf: default region = af-south-1, default AZs = [af-south-1a, af-south-1b, af-south-1c]; docs/gtm/sandbox-application/data-residency-proof.md: All GTCX data stored exclusively in AWS Africa (Cape Town) region; find docs/ -name '*dpa*' -o -name '*data*processing*' -o -name '*residency*': only data-residency-proof.md found

controls.name: Encryption at rest + in transit
controls.evidence: RDS storage_encrypted=true in database module. S3 buckets (kyc-documents, worm-audit) use SSE-KMS. KMS signing module scopes permissions to specific key and algorithm. ALB IngressClassParams enforces TLS 1.3 (ELBSecurityPolicy-TLS13-1-2-2021-06).
controls.raw_output: infra/terraform/modules/database/main.tf: storage_encrypted = true; infra/terraform/modules/kyc-documents/main.tf: aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration with sse_algorithm = aws:kms; infra/terraform/modules/worm-audit/main.tf: aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration with sse_algorithm = aws:kms; infra/terraform/modules/alb/main.tf: IngressClassParams sslPolicy = ELBSecurityPolicy-TLS13-1-2-2021-06; infra/terraform/modules/kms-signing/main.tf: scoped actions kms:Sign, kms:GetPublicKey, kms:DescribeKey with SigningAlgorithm = ECDSA_SHA_256 condition

controls.name: RBAC with least privilege
controls.evidence: IRSA platform policy scoped to specific KMS key ARN with ECDSA_SHA_256 condition. No literal '*' actions in non-root/Deny IAM policies. ALB controller policy contains broad ec2:Describe* and elasticloadbalancing:Describe* permissions on Resource='*'. AWS IAM Access Analyzer not referenced in Terraform.
controls.raw_output: grep -rn 'access_analyzer|AccessAnalyzer' infra/terraform/modules/: no results; grep -r --include='*.tf' 'Action.*\*' infra/terraform/modules/: only root-account Allow (kms:*, s3:*) and DenyNonSSL (s3:*) statements; infra/terraform/modules/irsa-platform/main.tf: AllowKmsSign scoped to var.kms_signing_key_arn with StringEquals kms:SigningAlgorithm = ECDSA_SHA_256; ALB main.tf: numerous ec2:Describe* and elasticloadbalancing:Describe* actions on Resource='*'

controls.name: 99.9% uptime SLA
controls.evidence: SLO burn-rate alerts, recording rules, and Grafana dashboard exist. SLI/SLO definitions documented. DR runbooks define RTO 4h and RPO 15min. No long-term historical uptime evidence (6+ months) available in-repo.
controls.raw_output: infra/monitoring/alerts/slo-burn-rate-alerts.yml: multi-window burn-rate alerts (14.4x, 6x, 2x, 1x); infra/monitoring/dashboards/gtcx-slo-dashboard.json: Grafana SLO dashboard; infra/monitoring/rules/slo-recording-rules.yml: Prometheus recording rules; docs/operations/slo-definitions.md: SLI/SLO definitions; docs/operations/runbooks/disaster-recovery.md: RTO 4h, RPO 15min

controls.name: Bug bounty or VDP
controls.evidence: Bug bounty policy published in-repo with defined scope, safe harbor, and responsible disclosure rules. No live HackerOne/Bugcrowd program confirmed in-repo.
controls.raw_output: docs/security/bug-bounty-policy.md: scope (replay-guard API, AGX Platform, mobile app, infrastructure, authn/authz, verification protocols), safe harbor, responsible disclosure (90-day coordination), payout table; no HackerOne/Bugcrowd page evidence in repo

controls.name: Business continuity plan
controls.evidence: BCP policy documented (a17-business-continuity.md). DR runbooks exist (disaster-recovery.md, disaster-recovery-detailed.md). Two drills executed in May 2026 (unauthorized KMS sign, replay-guard failure). RTO/RPO defined.
controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/policies/a17-business-continuity.md: BCP documented, RTO 4h critical / 24h non-critical, RPO 1h critical / 24h non-critical; docs/operations/runbooks/disaster-recovery.md: RTO 4h, RPO 15min; docs/operations/runbooks/dr-fire-drill-exercise.md: drill template; docs/operations/drills/drill-001-unauthorized-kms-sign-2026-05-12.md and drill-002-replay-guard-failure-2026-05-17.md: executed

controls.name: Vendor risk assessment passed
controls.evidence: Vendor risk program documented. Controls matrix maps to NIST 800-53, SOC 2 TSC, and ISO 27001. Separation-of-duties matrix exists. Vendor engagement readiness pack and pen-test outreach template present.
controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/vendor-risk-program.md: structured vendor risk management program; docs/compliance/controls-matrix.md: unified mapping across NIST 800-53 Rev 5, SOC 2 TSC, ISO 27001:2022; docs/compliance/separation-of-duties-matrix.md: separation of duties; docs/audit/vendor-engagement-readiness-pack.md and docs/audit/vendor-outreach/pen-test-vendor-outreach-template.md: engagement templates

controls.name: Data deletion certification
controls.evidence: Data retention policy active (GTCX-DRP-001) with retention schedules and deletion triggers. Data classification policy references cryptographic erasure and deletion certificates. No standalone certificate-of-destruction template found in-repo.
controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/data-retention-policy.md: active policy with 7-year audit trail, 90-day app logs, automatic rotation; docs/compliance/data-classification-policy.md: disposal methods include cryptographic erasure + deletion certificate; find docs/ -name '*destruction*' -o -name '*deletion*cert*': no standalone template found

recommendations: E.1: Engage SOC 2 Type I auditor immediately and produce a formal gap analysis document.
E.2: Send pen-test RFP to selected vendor (SensePost) and obtain a signed SOW; target kickoff within 2 weeks.
E.5: Enable AWS IAM Access Analyzer and reduce ALB controller ec2/elasticloadbalancing Describe* permissions to specific resources.
E.10: Create a standalone certificate-of-destruction template for high-sensitivity data disposal.
E.3: Draft a Data Processing Addendum (DPA) / data-residency contract template for enterprise customers.
